prompt.content: The Committee to Relocate Arnold (the Committee) has filed a California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) action against the City of San Dimas 50 days after the city filed a Notice of Exemption for a 3-year road closure to build a statue of Arnold Schwarzenegger. The Notice of Exemption indicates that the road will be abandoned. Was the CEQA action filed within the statute of limitations? Provide a brief answer and explanation.

rubrics.name: States that the statute of limitations was 180 days (ver_d5585c2395ab45238a64c29bd3d7a376)

messages.content: States that the statute of limitations was 180 days.

rubrics.name: States that the CEQA action was filed within the statute of limitations (ver_6e71b3e1c7cf4f2495b119a297d63a49)

messages.content: States that the CEQA action was filed within the statute of limitations.

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The CEQA action was filed within the statute of limitations because the statute of limitations was 180 days.
